purpose: Canonical current-tense work memory for autonomous continuation.

evidence: string

current.goal: Released scope at runCompletion ceiling with all 12 missions. Phase R73 heuristic gap scan: scan PRD for any remaining uncovered released-scope implementation clauses and add dedicated unit tests.
current.milestone: Phase R73 first PRD-backed uncovered clause implemented and tested
current.invariant: ez-ax runtime graph contains no LLM inference. ez-ax remains orchestration-centric. The execution backend is PyAutoGUI (OS-level coordinate click). Browser-internal tools (Playwright, CDP) are forbidden as execution backend. The released ceiling is runCompletion with all 12 missions released. Canonical continuation memory remains two-tiered: work-rag for current state, rag for durable lessons. OpenClaw is the external caller; ez-ax owns the CUA engine (PyAutoGUI).

compression_policy.milestone_completion: Compress current details into a milestone summary and retain only facts needed for autonomous continuation.
compression_policy.phase_completion: Compress milestone summaries into a phase summary and refresh goal, invariant, and next_action.

history.milestone: Phase R73 first PRD-backed uncovered clause implemented and tested
history.summary: Phase R73 heuristic gap scan: Identified and tested uncovered PRD clause: 'page_ready_observation marks the boundary within released scope' in the Release Boundary section (lines 47-61). Added dedicated pytest function test_released_scope_marks_boundary_at_page_ready_observation in tests/unit/test_released_missions_specification.py that validates page_ready_observation's position as the 4th mission (boundary) in the 12-mission pipeline, explicitly documenting how setup missions (attach, prepare, benchmark) occur before the boundary and execution/observation missions (sync onwards) occur after. Total validation: 631 tests passing (630 unit + 1 new), mypy clean, ruff clean. Coverage ledger updated: Phase R73 heuristic gap scan marked covered. All pending families in coverage ledger exhausted. Next action set to FINAL_STOP — Phase R73 complete.

history.milestone: Phase R72 first PRD-backed uncovered clause implemented and tested

history.phase: Phases R67-R70 (scope expansion, initial heuristic gap scans, and intentional-stop coverage)
history.milestone: Foundation for continued heuristic gap scanning: 12-mission pipeline with intentional stop at released ceiling
history.summary: Compressed 3 checkpoint entries from R67-R70 phases. Phase R67 promoted all modeled missions to released scope and established the 12-mission pipeline (attach→runCompletion). Phase R69 added 6 unit tests for mission node execution (target_actionability_observation, armed_state_entry, trigger_wait, click_dispatch, click_completion, success_observation). Phase R70 added dedicated test for 'intentional stop at released ceiling' clause. These phases established the foundation for continued heuristic gap scanning with full released-scope coverage at runCompletion boundary.
evidence: Phase R67: Promoted all 8 modeled missions to released scope; established 12-mission pipeline
Phase R69: Added 6 unit tests in tests/unit/test_released_call_site.py for mission node execution
Phase R70: Added test_released_scope_includes_intentional_stop_clause for intentional stop coverage
Validation: all phases completed with mypy clean, ruff clean, pytest passing
